author: cvuosalo
body:
This tool would be used by an expert to output the entire DD4hep simulation geometry in XML format, which can be used as the sim geometry DB payload. It is also very useful for migration validation, since it can be compared item-by-item with the same kind of XML file created with the old DD.

This draft PR has been submitted to facilitate discussion. It is not quite finished, because the output payload requires more validation.

This PR depends upon PR #34109, which has already been merged.

Example format of the XML file:
```
<DDDefinition>
<PosPartSection label="/geSingleBigFile.">
<PosPart copyNumber="1">
<rParent name="eregalgo:EBCBSS"/>
<rChild name="eregalgo:EBCBWA"/>
<Translation x="0.00*mm" y="0.00*mm" z="0.00*mm"/>
</PosPart>
<PosPart copyNumber="102">
<rParent name="eefixed:EECoolIns"/>
<rChild name="eregalgo:ECVFE"/>
<rRotation name="CTPPS_Diamond_Transformations:y_90_rot"/>
<Translation x="0.00*mm" y="15.00*mm" z="0.00*mm"/>
</PosPart>
</PosPartSection>
<MaterialSection label="/geSingleBigFile.">
<ElementaryMaterial name="materials:Aluminium" density="2.69900e+03*mg/cm3" atomicWeight="26.98200*g/mole" atomicNumber="13"/>
<CompositeMaterial name="pixfwdMaterials:FPix_CFSkin_OuterOuterRing" density="2.26770e+03*mg/cm3" method="mixture by weight">
<MaterialFraction fraction="1.000000000">
<rMaterial name="pixfwdMaterials:FPix_Disk_CF"/>
</MaterialFraction>
</CompositeMaterial>
</MaterialSection>
<RotationSection label="/geSingleBigFile.">
<Rotation name="CTPPS_Diamond_Transformations:y_90_rot" phiX="0.000*deg" thetaX="180.000*deg" phiY="90.000*deg" thetaY="90.000*deg" phiZ="0.000*deg" thetaZ=
"90.000*deg"/>
</RotationSection>
<SolidSection label="/geSingleBigFile.">
<Box name="parallel_world_solid" dx="101000.0000*mm" dy="101000.0000*mm" dz="450000.0000*mm"/>
</SolidSection>
<LogicalPartSection label="/geSingleBigFile.">
<LogicalPart name="eregalgo:EBCBWA">
<rSolid name="eregalgo:EBCBWA"/>
<rMaterial name="materials:E_Water"/>
</LogicalPart>
</LogicalPartSection>
<SpecParSection label="/geSingleBigFile.">
<SpecPar name="nStrips60" eval="false">
<PartSelector path="//MB4BottomRPC.*/MB.*RPC.*Gas.*"/>
<Parameter name="nStrips" value="60.000000" eval="true"/>
</SpecPar>
</SpecParSection>
</DDDefinition>
```
title: [RFC][DD4hep] Tool for creation of sim geometry DB payloads and for migration validation
